creator: bsd@philippost.de
text:
Created attachment 253999
math/polymake: update to version 4.13

Update math/polymake to version 4.13.

Changes:
- bump version number
- update distinfo and pkg-plist

Changelogs can be found here:
- 4.11: https://polymake.org/doku.php/news/release_4_11
- 4.12: https://polymake.org/doku.php/news/release_4_12
- 4.13: https://polymake.org/doku.php/news/release_4_13

poudriere testport is happy (checked with {13.4, 14.1}-{amd64,i386}-Release).
